opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My usual dull back ache suddenly turned into a sharp, tearing pain on my left side, and my urine looks like pure cranberry juice. I've got a kidney condition and I'm terrified my kidneys are about to fail.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain flared up suddenly tonight and there's now visible blood in my urine, and I feel a bit hot and wiped out.

symptom_narrative.onset: a chronic dull flank and lower-back ache for years, then a sudden severe escalation tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: the sharp new pain started a few hours ago and has stayed constant
symptom_narrative.character: was a dull persistent ache; now a sharp, tearing pain fixed in the left flank
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: much worse than my usual ache — I have to lie on my right side and stay still
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started, not coming and going
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying still on my right side eases it a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to sit up straight or twist my body
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: blood in my urine that looks like cranberry juice, feeling hot and run down
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get background aching most days but never a sudden sharp attack like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can still get around but I'm stuck lying on one side because of the pain

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a kidney condition where I have lots of cysts on both kidneys, runs in my family
high blood pressure that's been hard to control, picked up in my late twenties

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a blood pressure tablet (an ACE inhibitor)

family_history_as_reported.narrative: strong family history of kidney failure — relatives ended up with end-stage kidney disease

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: at home alone tonight, anxious about the visible blood and frightened his kidneys will suddenly fail

objective_data_offered.value: urine looks like pure cranberry juice — bright red, clearly bloody
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's visual description of urine colour; not laboratory-confirmed

objective_data_offered.value: feels hot and run down / lethargic, thinks he may have a low-grade fever
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective; no home thermometer reading provided

objective_data_offered.value: can only lie on the right side and stays very still to splint the left flank pain
